name: provider_clinical_summary_companion
description: Provider companion app (patient scope) rendering a live, read-only clinical summary — social determinants, conditions, medications, allergies, vitals, immunizations, surgical history — with WebSocket-driven refresh on domain events.

applications.name: Summary
applications.description: A mobile-first clinical overview of the open patient that keeps itself fresh on chart changes.

handlers.description: Serves the summary HTML shell, static assets, and the JSON data bundle (all sections or a named subset).
Listens for chart-change events and broadcasts per-section refresh pings on the patient's WebSocket channel.
Authenticates iframe WebSocket subscribers for the patient channel.
